metadata.title: CISA KEV to MDVM Findings Correlation Workbook
metadata.description: Maps CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities to active MDE Threat & Vulnerability Management findings in the tenant. Surfaces which actively exploited CVEs exist on which devices and tracks remediation progress.
Full resource ID of the Log Analytics / Sentinel workspace that hosts MDETVM_CL.

WorkbookDisplayName.defaultValue: CISA KEV to MDVM Findings Correlation

metadata.description: Region for the workbook. MUST match the Sentinel workspace region or it will not appear in the Sentinel/Monitor Workbooks UI.

content.json:
# CISA KEV to MDVM Findings Correlation

Correlates CISA's [Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (KEV) catalog](https://www.cisa.gov/known-exploited-vulnerabilities-catalog) — CVEs confirmed to be actively exploited in the wild — against live Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management (MDVM) findings from every onboarded device in the tenant.

Use this workbook to:
- See exactly **which KEV CVEs are present on which devices right now**, with the CVE name, affected software, CVSS score, and CISA-mandated remediation due date.
- Prioritize patching by **ransomware association** (CVEs CISA flags as used in known ransomware campaigns) and by **BOD 22-01 due date** (Past Due / Due < 14d).
- Identify the **most exposed devices** and the **software products driving the most KEV exposure**, so remediation effort lands where it removes the most risk.

**Data pipeline:** MDE agent → Microsoft Defender Vulnerability Management API → Logic App (`MDETVM`, daily 02:00 UTC, paginated via `@odata.nextLink`) → Data Collection Rule → `MDETVM_CL` (Log Analytics). Native MDVM `firstSeenTimestamp` and `lastSeenTimestamp` are preserved alongside ingestion `TimeGenerated`.

parameters.name: DeviceName
parameters.label: Device
parameters.query:
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| distinct deviceName
| order by deviceName asc

parameters.name: CveId
parameters.label: CVE ID
parameters.query:
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| distinct cveId
| order by cveId asc

parameters.name: VulnerabilityName
parameters.label: Vulnerability name (CISA)
parameters.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| distinct cveId
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| distinct vulnerabilityName
| order by vulnerabilityName asc

parameters.name: VendorProject
parameters.label: Vendor (CISA)
parameters.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| distinct cveId
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| distinct vendorProject
| order by vendorProject asc

parameters.name: Product
parameters.label: Product (CISA)
parameters.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| distinct cveId
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| distinct product
| order by product asc

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
let KEV = MDETVM_CL
  | where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
  | summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
  | where deviceName in ({DeviceName}) or '*' in ({DeviceName})
  | where cveId in ({CveId}) or '*' in ({CveId})
  | join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
  | where vulnerabilityName in ({VulnerabilityName}) or '*' in ({VulnerabilityName})
  | where vendorProject in ({VendorProject}) or '*' in ({VendorProject})
  | where product in ({Product}) or '*' in ({Product});
let Stats = KEV
  | summarize
      KEVMatches      = count(),
      UniqueCVEs      = dcount(cveId),
      AffectedDevices = dcount(deviceName),
      RansomwareCVEs  = dcountif(cveId, knownRansomwareCampaignUse != 'Unknown'),
      PastDue         = countif(dueDate < now());
Stats
| mv-expand
    Metric = pack_array('KEV Matches','Unique CVEs','Affected Devices','Ransomware CVEs','Past Due') to typeof(string),
    Value  = pack_array(KEVMatches, UniqueCVEs, AffectedDevices, RansomwareCVEs, PastDue) to typeof(long)
| project Metric, Value

let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| where deviceName in ({DeviceName}) or '*' in ({DeviceName})
| where cveId in ({CveId}) or '*' in ({CveId})
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| where vulnerabilityName in ({VulnerabilityName}) or '*' in ({VulnerabilityName})
| where vendorProject in ({VendorProject}) or '*' in ({VendorProject})
| where product in ({Product}) or '*' in ({Product})
| extend DaysUntilDue = datetime_diff('day', dueDate, now())
| extend DueStatus = case(DaysUntilDue < 0, 'Past Due', DaysUntilDue < 14, 'Due < 14d', 'Due > 14d')
| sort by DueStatus asc, cvssScore desc
| project ['Device Name'] = deviceName, ['CVE ID'] = cveId, Vulnerability = vulnerabilityName, Description = shortDescription, Vendor = vendorProject, Product = product, Software = softwareName, Version = softwareVersion, Severity = vulnerabilitySeverityLevel, ['CVSS Score'] = cvssScore, ['Ransomware Use'] = knownRansomwareCampaignUse, ['Due Date'] = dueDate, ['Due Status'] = DueStatus, ['Recommended Update'] = recommendedSecurityUpdate, ['Update Available'] = securityUpdateAvailable
content.title: Active KEV findings (all devices)

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| where deviceName in ({DeviceName}) or '*' in ({DeviceName})
| where cveId in ({CveId}) or '*' in ({CveId})
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| where vulnerabilityName in ({VulnerabilityName}) or '*' in ({VulnerabilityName})
| where vendorProject in ({VendorProject}) or '*' in ({VendorProject})
| where product in ({Product}) or '*' in ({Product})
| summarize ['KEV Count'] = dcount(cveId) by ['Device Name'] = deviceName
| top 10 by ['KEV Count'] desc
content.title: Top 10 devices by KEV count

content.query:
let CISA_KEV = externaldata(cveID:string, vendorProject:string, product:string, vulnerabilityName:string, dateAdded:datetime, shortDescription:string, requiredAction:string, dueDate:datetime, knownRansomwareCampaignUse:string, notes:string)[@'https://www.cisa.gov/sites/default/files/csv/known_exploited_vulnerabilities.csv'] with (format='csv', ignoreFirstRecord=True);
MDETVM_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(2d)
| summarize arg_max(TimeGenerated, *) by cveId, deviceName
| where deviceName in ({DeviceName}) or '*' in ({DeviceName})
| where cveId in ({CveId}) or '*' in ({CveId})
| join kind=inner (CISA_KEV) on $left.cveId == $right.cveID
| where vulnerabilityName in ({VulnerabilityName}) or '*' in ({VulnerabilityName})
| where vendorProject in ({VendorProject}) or '*' in ({VendorProject})
| where product in ({Product}) or '*' in ({Product})
| summarize Count = count() by Software = softwareName
| top 10 by Count desc
content.title: Top 10 software products by KEV count
